name: codelens
description: MUST activate before writing/editing/deleting any class/id/function. 41 commands. Agent-optimized: score-based ask routing, markdown formatters, semantic conventions (8 detectors), AGENT.md, decision trees, quality metrics. TSX backend extraction (6x more nodes). Fuzzy file path lookup. Auto-incremental scan with deleted file handling. Shared utils module. Proper logging. Registry freshness check. Calibrated health score. Tree-sitter, 10 langs, workspace auto-detect. v5.9: Full PHP support — Laravel, Symfony, WordPress, Slim, CodeIgniter, Yii, CakePHP, Lumen detection. PHP parser (functions, classes, methods, traits, enums, namespaces, use statements, Eloquent models, Laravel routes). Blade template parser (directives, components, sections, includes). Laravel route extraction in api-map (Route::get/post/resource/apiResource, groups, middleware). PHP entrypoint patterns (Artisan commands, Laravel routes, Symfony attributes). Composer.lock detection. vendor/ and storage/ auto-ignore.
author: codelens
